L3 Visualization

Coinbase BTC-USD · Level 3 · 6,767,000 Orders
↓ SCROLL ↓
I — THE FABRIC

The Fabric of Liquidity

Every dot is an individual limit order resting on Coinbase's BTC-USD order book. Twenty thousand orders captured over forty-two minutes. Grey-blue points are bids—buyers waiting. Red points are asks—sellers waiting. The gap between them is the spread, where price discovery happens.

Watch the density shift. Bright clusters form at key price levels—the liquidity walls that traders watch. They appear, thicken, and dissolve as the market breathes.

I.b — THE ORDER CLOUD

The Order Cloud

Every bubble is a single limit order floating in three-dimensional space. Time flows along X, price rises on Y, quantity extends into Z. Green particles are bids, red are asks. Drag to orbit. Scroll to zoom.

13,600 individual orders across 136 snapshots—the raw point cloud of liquidity that only Level 3 data can reveal.

II — DEPTH & VELOCITY

Two Sides of the Same Book

Left: where liquidity sits. Teal bands are price levels where orders stack. Right: how fast it moves. Red = orders depleting. Teal = orders accumulating.

The depth shows you the walls. The velocity shows you which are real and which are phantom. VWAP = L1. CVD = L2. QDV = L3.

III — DEPTH & VELOCITY
Depth Terrain
Queue Velocity

Two Sides of the Same Book

Left: where liquidity sits. The taller the peak, the deeper the queue. Right: how fast it moves. Red = orders being consumed. Teal = orders accumulating.

The depth shows you the walls. The velocity shows you which walls are real and which are phantom. VWAP = L1. CVD = L2. QDV = L3.

IV — INTO THE DEPTH

Into the Depth

The flat heatmap reveals where orders concentrate. But density has a third dimension— height. The transition above lifts the chart off the page, extruding each cell by its order count. Peaks are zones of furious quoting. Valleys are quiet stretches where no one cares to place an order.

V — RIVER FLOW

River Flow

The blue line is OCI bid—where committed buyers rest. The red line is OCI ask— where committed sellers hold. The white line is the mid price weaving between them.

The particles floating between the bands are phantom orders—ghosts that appeared and vanished between snapshots. Denser clusters mean stronger commitment. VWAP = L1. CVD = L2. OCI = L3.

VI — ORDER ARCS

Filled vs Cancelled

Each arc traces an order from placement to death. Green = executed. Magenta = cancelled. The height of each arc shows how long the order lived before its fate was sealed.

84% of orders get cancelled—only 16% actually fill. 73.6% die within a single snapshot. The book is a graveyard of phantom liquidity. VWAP = L1. CVD = L2. OCI = L3.
